calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2018 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Daniel Wong'S Application For A Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-30-2018 Continued To Jul-31-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Plaintiff Daniel Wong'S Application For A Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-31-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Jony Tan.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Victor M. Marquez, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Daniel Wong, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Jony Tan.
Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract and accounting was filed on June 16, 2017 and served on June 20, 2017.
Default was entered against defendant on September 27, 2017
No DOE defendants.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Daniel Wong, and against the Defaulted Defendant Jony Tan, as follows:

Damages - $280,400.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $32,111.76.
Costs - $450.00.

Total - $312,961.76.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
